output.code:
# open the file and print contents and repr to see indices
path="/mnt/data/file-XLCKC7AVTwN4WtnnF8Tmzf-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path,"rb") as f:
    data = f.read()
text = data.decode('utf-8')
print("Length:", len(text))
print("---TEXT---")
print(text)
print("---REPR---")
print(repr(text[:500]))

text = open("/mnt/data/file-XLCKC7AVTwN4WtnnF8Tmzf-text_to_analyse.txt","r", encoding="utf-8").read()
ayah1 = "إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ"
ayah2 = "إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ"
# hadith: extract inner text between first double quote after "قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم: "
start_marker = 'قال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم: "'
# find start of the opening quote for hadith
i = text.find(start_marker)
i

pos1 = text.find(ayah1)
pos2 = text.find(ayah2)
pos1, pos2

start_quote_idx = text.find('"', i+len(start_marker)-1)  # maybe redundant
start_quote_idx

hadith = text[start_quote_idx+1:].rstrip()  # remove trailing whitespace/newline
len(hadith), hadith[:200]
